documents.title: Context source lifecycle
documents.content: The context source lifecycle note covers creation, document ingestion, soft deletion, restore, and audit metadata for synthetic project context.

documents.title: Retrieval evaluation scope
documents.content: The retrieval evaluation scope says fixtures are synthetic, reports are local artifacts, and no LLM-as-judge or external provider is used.

queries.query: which real customer account owns the project
what production secret value should be used
which external provider judged the answer
